build_system: Swift Package Manager (swift build). Code uses #if os(macOS) and #if canImport(Observation) guards extensively. Each major type has macOS, Linux-with-Observation, and Linux-without-Observation variants. All Pixel Office views are guarded with #if os(macOS).
test_framework: XCTest with async/await patterns. Tests use @MainActor via await MainActor.run {}. Tests in Tests/KiroKantokuTests/PixelOfficeTests.swift.
verification_instructions: 1. Run swift build and confirm no errors. 2. Run swift test and confirm all 250+ tests pass with 0 failures.
setup_instructions: Swift 6.2.1 is pre-installed. Just run swift build from /projects/sandbox/kiro-kantoku.
environment_constraints: Linux sandbox - no macOS, no SwiftUI rendering. Views use #if os(macOS) so they compile on Linux as empty. Tests work on Linux since they only test model/viewmodel logic (no SwiftUI views). OPEN_INTERNET network mode.
contribution_requirements: Open an issue first to discuss changes. MIT license.
key_patterns: 1. Every observable class has three variants: macOS with @Observable, Linux with @Observable (#if canImport(Observation)), Linux without Observation. 2. PixelOfficeViewModel has identical code in the macOS and Linux-Observation blocks - both must be updated. 3. Views are #if os(macOS) only. 4. DesignConstants provides shared spacing/color values. 5. Color hex extension is private in PixelSpriteView.swift. 6. characterPalettes in Constants maps characterIndex to hair/shirt colors. 7. PixelCharacter.CharacterState has 5 states: working, drinkingCoffee, needsInput, walking, idle.
directory_structure: Sources/KiroKantoku/Views/PixelOffice/ contains all pixel office files. Sources/KiroKantoku/Models/ has data models. Sources/KiroKantoku/Services/ has AgentManager and TaskManager. Tests/KiroKantokuTests/ has test files.
